rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Co-Defenant'S Joinder To Defendant Anne Kihagi'S Motion For Order Terminating Receivership And For A Final Report And Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 16, 2024 line 1. DEFENDANT JULIA MWANGI, XELAN PROP 1, LLC, RENKA PROP, LLC, NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC, CHRISTINE MWANGI CO-DEFENANT'S JOINDER TO DEFENDANT ANNE KIHAGI'S MOTION FOR ORDER TERMINATING RECEIVERSHIP AND FOR A FINAL REPORT AND ACCOUNTING is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Terminate The Ccsf Receivership And For An Order Directing Receiver To File Final Report & Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 16, 2024 line 1. DEFENDANT JULIA MWANGI, CHRISTINE MWANGI, XELAN PROP 1, LLC, RENKA PROP, LLC, NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC MOTION TO TERMINATE THE CCSF RECEIVERSHIP AND FOR AN ORDER DIRECTING RECEIVER TO FILE FINAL REPORT & ACCOUNTING is GRANTED. Upon entry of final judgement in action CGC-22-600108 (per May 15, 2024 ruling), the receiver shall file the final report and set a hearing for termination of receivership. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
